case_title: BHAJAN S. JOHAL VS. AT&T CORP.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JOHAL, BHAJAN S. AS TO DEFENDANT AT&T CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AT&T CORP.

JOHAL AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE GARRETT PRIOSTE, RETAIL STORE MANAGER FOR AT&T CORP. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETURNED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-25-2016 - JUDGMENT.
